title: Cursed Fate: Ratio Technique Addon
description: Addon for Cursed Fate mod, that add Kento Nanami`s Ratio Technique to Minecraft
body:
Addon for Cursed Fate mod, that add Kento Nanami`s Ratio Technique to Minecraft

**Abilities can be changed or reworked, it NOT fully maked**

![Abilities Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e4a4e4ff8e79e819a32fb0fa0a6588e83cf66c9.png)

Ratio Slash(hold): Put Ratio Bar on enemies and make slash
-   Chant & Flow: Increase damage (stacable)
-   Revealing One`s Hand: Detach limb

Ratio Dash(hold): Dash, then put Ratio Bar on enemies and make slash
-   Chant: Increase damage and distant of dash
-   Flow: Increase damage
-   Revealing One`s Hand: Detach limb

Collapse(hold): 
- [Ground] - Prepare and smash ground with Ratio Bar to make shake wave 
- [Air] - Dash to air and impact on ground with Ratio Bar to make shake wave

  (change shake wave depend on gamerule)
  
-   Flow: Increase damage
-   Revealing One`s Hand: Apply Cursed Energy to blocks on collapse and make it levitate

Apply Ratio(hold): Apply Ratio Bar to enemy and lock in to enemy with 7:3 on bar, hitting not by technique increase damage and remove Bar, hitting by Ratio Technique, remove Bar and nullify damage. 
-   Cost 1 Focus. Not Stacks with Chant Bonus

Cut(hold): teleport forward and cut enemies what behind
-   Flow: increase teleport range
-   Revealing One`s Hand: Detach limb


Revealing One`s Hand: Unlock full potential of Technique by reveal own Technique
